assumptions: The declared intragroup dividend has created a foreign-currency-denominated monetary receivable/payable between group entities with different functional currencies, so exchange differences are not fully eliminated on consolidation and can affect consolidated profit or loss.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge of the foreign currency risk component
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: This is a genuine hedge designation route because IFRS 9 allows a recognised intragroup monetary item that leaves foreign exchange gains or losses in consolidation to be designated as a hedged item, including only its foreign currency risk component.
